_meta.notes: All prompts follow official NVIDIA guide: media-first, system prompt, reasoning mode where noted

reasoning_suffix:
Answer the question using the following format:

<think>
Your reasoning.
</think>

Write your final answer immediately after the </think> tag.

B1_latency_3_frames.prompt: Describe what you see in these 3 surveillance frames.

B2_object_inventory.prompt: List every object you can identify. For each: name, position (left/center/right), size (small/medium/large), color/material.

B2_counting_balloons.prompt: How many balloons are visible? Count each one by color.

B2_counting_chairs.prompt: How many chairs are at the dining table? Count carefully.

B2_counting_table_items.prompt: How many separate items are on the dining table? List each one.
B2_counting_table_items.ground_truth: ~7: magazine, toys/markers, mug, roses vase, book/magazine, cloth, green mat

B2_small_objects_pens.prompt: Can you see any pens, markers, or writing instruments on the table?
B2_small_objects_pens.ground_truth: Yes, several markers/pens center-left of table

B2_small_objects_switch.prompt: Can you see a light switch or electrical outlet on the wall?
B2_small_objects_switch.ground_truth: Yes, dark switch panel on right wall

B2_state_door.prompt: Is the terrace/balcony door open or closed? Is there a curtain blowing? Provide evidence from the image.
B2_state_door.ground_truth: Door OPEN, curtain blowing from airflow

B3_change_mug_general.prompt: Two photos of the same room. What changed? List every difference.

B3_change_mug_targeted.prompt: Image 1 is BEFORE, Image 2 is AFTER. Was any NEW object added? If yes: what, color, where?
B3_change_mug_targeted.ground_truth: Orange mug added to center-left of table

B3_change_roses_general.prompt: Two photos of the same room. What changed? List every difference.
B3_change_roses_general.ground_truth: Roses vase moved from right to left side of table

B3_change_roses_targeted.prompt: Image 1 is BEFORE, Image 2 is AFTER. Was any object moved? If yes: what, from where, to where?
B3_change_roses_targeted.ground_truth: Roses vase moved from right to left side of table

B3_change_roller_general.prompt: Two photos of the same scene. What changed? List every difference.
B3_change_roller_general.ground_truth: Dark blue foam roller removed from green container

B3_change_roller_targeted.prompt: Image 1 is BEFORE, Image 2 is AFTER. Was any object removed? If yes: what, color, where was it?
B3_change_roller_targeted.ground_truth: Dark blue foam roller removed from green container on sofa

B3_lighting_per_image.prompt: What is the lighting state in this bathroom? Which lights are on/off? Overall brightness and color temperature?
B3_lighting_per_image.note: Run separately for light_1.jpg, light_2.jpg, light_3.jpg

B3_lighting_comparison.prompt: Three photos of the same bathroom with different lighting. For each: which lights are on/off? Summarize changes 1→2 and 2→3.

B4_motion_frames.prompt: Three sequential frames (0s, 1s, 2s). Is anything moving? What object, direction, speed?
B4_motion_frames.ground_truth: Blue foam roller rolling left→right, slow speed

B4_motion_video.prompt: Is anything moving? What, direction, speed?
B4_motion_video.ground_truth: Blue foam roller rolling left→right, slow speed

B4_person_detection.prompt: Is there a person in this image? If yes, describe them.
B4_person_detection.ground_truth: Yes: man in dark green polka dot shirt, navy pants
B4_person_detection.note: Run for each person_f0 through person_f4

B4_person_tracking.prompt: Three sequential frames (0s, 4s, 8s). Is anyone moving? Who, direction, entering or leaving?
B4_person_tracking.ground_truth: Person walks L→R to window, turns, walks R→L back out

B4_activity_recognition.prompt: What is this person doing? Choose: walking, running, standing, sitting, crouching, reaching, looking around. Direction of movement?

B5_security_door.prompt: You are a security AI. Analyze: 1) ALERT LEVEL (green/yellow/orange/red) 2) Is any door/window open? 3) Curtain movement? 4) Recommended action.
B5_security_door.ground_truth: Door OPEN, curtain blowing, should be YELLOW+ alert

B5_security_person.prompt: SECURITY AI: Person detected. 1) ALERT LEVEL 2) Person description 3) Threat assessment 4) Recommended action.

B5_door_sequence.prompt: Three surveillance frames (0s, 3s, 6s). What changed? Focus on doors, windows, curtains. Security implications?
B5_door_sequence.ground_truth: Door goes from closed to open, curtain starts blowing

B6_room_dimensions.prompt: Estimate room dimensions (width × depth) in meters. Standard sofa = 2.5m long for reference.

B6_stability.prompt: Is any furniture at risk of falling or tipping? Any unstable objects?
B6_stability.ground_truth: Wooden stool leaning against wall — tipping risk

B7_json_change.prompt: Compare Image 1 and Image 2. Return JSON: {"added": [{"object": "...", "color": "...", "location": "..."}], "removed": [], "moved": []}
